data.current_description: Retrieve parking reports for a specified date range. Query only needed dates for optimal performance.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve parking reports for date range
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve parking reports for a specified facility within a date range. Returns ItemState records representing the current state of each parking item (occupancy, availability, reservations). Query only the needed date range for optimal performance. Maximum 31-day range recommended.
